_comment: Cost + reliability tuning. cacheRetention=long maximizes prompt-cache TTL (1h on Anthropic direct, prefix routing on OpenAI, cached-contents on Gemini). contextPruning trims tool results after cache TTL expires — provider-neutral installs (MiniMax/Groq/xAI) get no pruning by default, so cookclaw turns it on. loopDetection.enabled=true is recommended for smaller models (Groq/Cerebras/MiniMax); flagship models like Anthropic/OpenAI can leave it on too — it's cheap insurance.
